title: No bar on reporting facts but don't add embellishments: Bombay HC to Republic TV in Anil Ambani defamation case
description: The Bombay High Court on Thursday cautioned news channel Republic TV and its editor Arnab Goswami against adding embellishments to its coverage of court proceedings [Anil Ambani v. ARG Outlier & Ors]Justice Arif Doctor remarked that while no one could be stopped from reporting on legal proceedings, such reporting must be confined to facts emerging from court orders and records. “Please report all of that. No one is stopping you. But there is no need to add embellishments,” the judge sai
